name: HOVNANIAN ENTERPRISES INC
summary: Hovnanian Enterprises, Inc. designs, constructs, markets, and sells single-family detached homes, attached townhomes, condominiums, urban infill, and active lifestyle homes in planned residential developments across 27 markets in 13 states. Founded in 1959, the company also provides financial services including mortgage origination and title services. It operates through three homebuilding segments—Northeast, Southeast, and West—and has delivered over 382,000 homes since inception.

products.name: Single-family detached homes
products.description: Designed and constructed homes sold to first-time, move-up, luxury, and active lifestyle buyers.

products.name: Attached townhomes and condominiums
products.description: Multi-unit residential homes sold in planned residential developments.

products.name: Urban infill homes
products.description: Homes built in urban infill locations as part of planned residential developments.

products.name: Active lifestyle homes
products.description: Homes designed for active lifestyle and empty nester buyers.

products.name: Mortgage loan origination
products.description: Mortgage loans provided to homebuilding customers through financial services operations.

products.name: Title services
products.description: Title services provided to homebuilding customers through financial services operations.

partnerships.description: Joint venture to own and develop Town & Country Homes existing residential communities, entered in 2005.
Founding member; supports education and careers for underrepresented groups in residential construction.
